title: 10 best herbal teas for fungal skin infection
description: Ceylon cinnamon teas helps with fungal skin infection because of its antifungal properties, which target the growth of Candida albicans, a common fungus that causes infections. The tea's active compounds, cinnamaldehyde and cinnamic acid, inhibit the production of enzymes that help fungi spread and multiply. Additionally, Ceylon cinnamon has been shown to improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation, allowing the body to heal faster from skin infections. This natural remedy can be...
